Shibata Zeshin

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Gathering of Otsu-e Subjects
by Shibata Zeshin
Japan, Meiji period (1868–1912) · late 1800s · Eight-panel folding screen; ink and color on hemp
Inro, Ojime, Netsuke
by Shibata Zeshin
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) to Meiji period (1868–1912) · later 1800s · lacquer with sprinkled gold, silver, and mother-of-pearl design, coral, and wood
